summary: Tested new Date Triggers features: date-based campaigns (birthday/anniversary/sold date), holiday triggers, and contact auto-tagging. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend Date Triggers page loads correctly with Dates and Holidays tabs.
critical_code_review_comments: Date Triggers API correctly returns 14 US holidays with proper structure (id, name, month, day)
Birthday/Anniversary/Sold Date trigger configs save and retrieve correctly with delivery methods and templates
Bulk holiday config update works - enables/disables selected holidays in single request
Contact auto-tagging works - creating contact with birthday field auto-adds 'Birthday' tag
Contact auto-tagging works - creating contact with anniversary field auto-adds 'Anniversary' tag
Contact auto-tagging works - creating contact with date_sold field auto-adds 'Sold Date' tag
Frontend Date Triggers page has proper Dates/Holidays tabs with correct UI structure
More page has 'Date Triggers' link under Communication section with subtitle 'Birthdays, anniversaries, holidays'
Branding logo endpoint returns 200 with image/png content type
Contacts page loads properly without performance issues
seed_data_creation: Created test contacts: TEST_Birthday AutoTag (Birthday tag), TEST_Anniversary AutoTag (Anniversary tag), TEST_SoldDate AutoTag (Sold Date tag), TEST_MultiDate AutoTag (all 3 tags + VIP)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Date Triggers features verified working: 1) GET /api/date-triggers/holidays returns 14 US holidays, 2) PUT/GET configs for birthday/anniversary/sold_date work, 3) Bulk holiday updates work, 4) Contact auto-tagging adds Birthday/Anniversary/Sold Date tags when date fields are saved, 5) Frontend Date Triggers page (/settings/date-triggers) has working Dates and Holidays tabs, 6) More page has Date Triggers link under Communication section

features_verified.GET_holidays_api: PASS - Returns 14 US holidays with correct structure
features_verified.PUT_birthday_config: PASS - Saves birthday trigger with delivery method and template
features_verified.GET_configs_api: PASS - Returns all saved configs for user
features_verified.auto_tag_sold_date: PASS - Contact with date_sold auto-tagged 'Sold Date'
features_verified.auto_tag_multiple: PASS - Contact with all dates gets all tags + preserves existing
features_verified.frontend_date_triggers_page: PASS - Page loads with Dates and Holidays tabs
features_verified.frontend_dates_tab: PASS - Shows Birthday, Anniversary, Sold Date triggers with toggles/templates
features_verified.frontend_holidays_tab: PASS - Shows 14 US holidays with checkboxes and dates
features_verified.frontend_more_page_link: PASS - Date Triggers link under Communication section

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All requested features verified working correctly
